# The build of worklog takes a fair while due to the size of the dependency
# tree, the size of some of the individual dependencies and the absence of
# caching when building within a test script.
[short] stop 'Skipping long test.'

env HOME=${WORK}

env GOBIN=${WORK}/bin
env PATH=${GOBIN}:${PATH}
cd ${PKG_ROOT}
go install ./cmd/worklog
cd ${WORK}

unquote debug_log.snarf

# Zulu-marked zero time.
env ZEROTIME=0001-01-01T00:00:00Z
expand debug_log.snarf debug_log_good.snarf
exec worklog -log=DEBUG -debug debug_log_good.snarf
cmp stdout want_good.text

# UTC-marked zero time: invalid Go JSON via RFC3339.
env ZEROTIME=0001-01-01T00:00:00+UTC
expand debug_log.snarf debug_log_bad.snarf
! exec worklog -log=DEBUG -debug debug_log_bad.snarf
stderr 'failed eval: no such overload'

# LMT zero time for somewhere: not zero time in CEL.
env ZEROTIME=0001-01-01T09:14:20+09:14
expand debug_log.snarf debug_log_bad.snarf
! exec worklog -log=DEBUG -debug debug_log_bad.snarf
stderr 'failed eval: integer overflow'

-- want_good.text --
{"bucket":"afk","start":"0001-01-01T00:00:00Z","end":"2026-02-04T10:42:51.870486845+10:30","data":{"afk":true,"locked":false},"continue":false}
-- debug_log.snarf --
>-- prg --
>data_src != {"module":"watcher"} ? {} :
>{
>        "afk_timeout":   duration("3m"),
>        "gap_tolerance": duration("0.1s"),
>}.as(params, {
>        "can_continue":  last_event.end.is_zero() ?
>                             false
>                         :
>                             (curr.time-last_event.end)-period < params.gap_tolerance,
>        "is_afk":        curr.last_input.is_zero() ?
>                             true
>                         :
>                             curr.locked || curr.time-curr.last_input > params.afk_timeout,
>        "was_afk":       has(last_event.data.afk) ?
>                             last_event.data.afk
>                         :
>                             true,
>}).as(cond, cond.with({
>        "continue":      cond.can_continue &&
>                         has(last.locked) && curr.locked == last.locked &&
>                         cond.is_afk == cond.was_afk
>})).as(cond, {
>        "bucket":        bucket, // bucket or empty if no store is required.
>        "start":         cond.continue ? last_event.start : last.time,
>        "end":           curr.time,
>        "data":          {
>                             "afk":    cond.is_afk,
>                             "locked": curr.locked,
>                         },
>        "continue":      cond.continue,
>})
>-- data --
>{
>	"time": "2026-02-14T11:10:42.109997519+10:30",
>	"level": "ERROR",
>	"source": {
>		"function": "main.(*daemon).record",
>		"file": ".../worklog/main.go",
>		"line": 740
>	},
>	"msg": "activity evaluation",
>	"component": "worklog",
>	"bucket": "afk",
>	"act": {
>		"bucket": "afk",
>		"curr": {
>			"class": "",
>			"last_input": "${ZEROTIME}",
>			"locked": false,
>			"name": "",
>			"pid": 0,
>			"time": "2026-02-04T10:42:51.870486845+10:30",
>			"wid": 0,
>			"window": ""
>		},
>		"data_src": {
>			"module": "watcher"
>		},
>		"last": {
>			"time": "0001-01-01T00:00:00Z"
>		},
>		"last_event": {
>			"bucket": "",
>			"continue": null,
>			"data": {
>				"afk": false,
>				"locked": false
>			},
>			"end": "2026-02-04T06:56:45.66170124+10:30",
>			"id": 2524,
>			"start": "2026-02-04T06:00:12.661701734+10:30"
>		},
>		"period": 1000000000
>	}
>}
>
